Optimized for your mobile phone. en Tue, 09 Jun 2026 11:52:00 -0400 Chief experience officer at Walmart’s Sam’s Club to exit https://www.retaildive.com/news/walmart-sams-club-chief-experience-officer-exits/822360/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/Hey_0JCEus_RARlBKQ6xXOha0O3PnYDW8BLo1oBIYpc/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0yMjI0MDE1MjAxLmpwZw==.webp"/></div></figure><p>Diana Marshall is the latest leadership departure at Walmart Inc. since CEO John Furner took over earlier this year.</p> Dani James Tue, 09 Jun 2026 11:52:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/walmart-sams-club-chief-experience-officer-exits/822360/ Connecticut becomes second state to regulate dynamic pricing https://www.retaildive.com/news/connecticut-new-york-dynamic-pricing-bills-grocery-retail/822337/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/oW15tyOuBkJk15pZf7HxvkJwzrwulCmAkYuj6f7kIf0/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xMDI4OTYyMTA4LmpwZw==.webp"/></div></figure><p>The state follows Maryland in enacting legislation that bars retailers from using personally identifiable data to customize prices. A similar bill is awaiting action by New York&rsquo;s governor.</p> Sam Silverstein Tue, 09 Jun 2026 11:18:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/connecticut-new-york-dynamic-pricing-bills-grocery-retail/822337/ Bed Bath & Beyond continues acquisition spree https://www.retaildive.com/news/bed-bath-beyond-acquisition-installation-renovation/822351/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/iE7u3uR_idOKNdUo0PGEb7cFYlLEBHqJoTeXMNOXq9I/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS8wNV9NQVlfTUIzX1RDU19GVF9XT1JUSDc2MDIuanBn.webp"/></div></figure><p>The home retailer is building out its services portfolio with an all-stock acquisition of an installation and renovation services company.</p> Dani James Tue, 09 Jun 2026 11:01:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/bed-bath-beyond-acquisition-installation-renovation/822351/ Nike and Adidas take their rivalry to the World Cup. Who will win? https://www.retaildive.com/news/nike-adidas-world-cup-retail-marketing-rivalry/822335/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/19a8Ypx2inCbt2Bi_x88QZkwImYOvipXhO3vkDMp2i4/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9hZGlkYXNfVnBKVWUwMi5qcGc=.webp"/></div></figure><p>The brands are both at a crossroads, and their campaign centerpieces play up soccer bona fides alongside the sport&rsquo;s stars and other pop icons.</p> Chris Kelly Tue, 09 Jun 2026 10:34:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/nike-adidas-world-cup-retail-marketing-rivalry/822335/ Optimus Prime will take your call: Hasbro leans into AI-driven licensing https://www.retaildive.com/news/hasbro-launches-ai-studio-to-license-optimus-prime-mr-potato-head/822225/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/7K-SfQwc-7mflXYfYm_-_PjcjbWfc5BN8AK8mv9zpoM/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9tcl9wb3RhdG9faGVhZC5qcGc=.webp"/></div></figure><p>The toy company&rsquo;s AI studio, Sixth Wall, will debut behavioral licensing, which is focused on how characters think, speak and interact in new experiences.</p> Kaarin Moore Tue, 09 Jun 2026 10:24:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/hasbro-launches-ai-studio-to-license-optimus-prime-mr-potato-head/822225/ Saks Global faces pivotal year as court approves bankruptcy exit plans https://www.retaildive.com/news/saks-global-bankruptcy-exit-court-approval/822240/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/x1db3wPOat5KIWeP8FtKruzmqS9rZzSG-_lPRVM3dZg/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9TYWtzX2ludGVyaW9yX2NvbG9yXzFfZGFwaG5laG93bGFuZC5qcGVn.webp"/></div></figure><p>The company will slash debt by 75%, get $500 million in new financing and aim for $9 billion in GMV by 2030. But now customers need to come back.</p> Daphne Howland Mon, 08 Jun 2026 12:27:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/saks-global-bankruptcy-exit-court-approval/822240/ Amazon launches AI image generator to narrow search queries https://www.retaildive.com/news/amazon-launches-ai-image-generator-search-bar-queries/822231/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/b0Eu4h4b8RQHWDZeE8lC68FB7-H8PzocjPK0-Po75HI/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9zaG9wLWJ5LXN0eWxlLWlubGluZS1ibHVlLnBuZw==.webp"/></div></figure><p>Users describing a product in the e-commerce giant&rsquo;s app can now choose from a variety of AI-generated images to shop similar items.&nbsp;</p> Tatiana Walk-Morris Mon, 08 Jun 2026 11:20:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/amazon-launches-ai-image-generator-search-bar-queries/822231/ Best Buy rolls out Meta Lab shop-in-shops https://www.retaildive.com/news/best-buy-meta-lab-shop-in-shops-open/822216/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/FB1JcuMNtpJj2lH7SAavU0uaCkVekadZW8f5fyNade0/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9CZXN0X0J1eV9NZXRhX0xhYl8xLmpwZw==.webp"/></div></figure><p>The retailer will debut the spaces &mdash; which allow shoppers to test Meta&#39;s lineup of AI glasses and VR headsets &mdash; at 50 locations this summer.</p> Dani James Mon, 08 Jun 2026 10:45:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/best-buy-meta-lab-shop-in-shops-open/822216/ Delivery reliability trumps speed, Macy’s and Ulta execs say https://www.retaildive.com/news/retailer-delivery-reliability-trumps-speed-macys-ulta/822175/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/-lI3LJwJEMI3XZjd_Bf7lTs3RTbSgquf5Xp2UiR5-P0/g:nowe:0:0/c:3747:2117/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9HZXR0eUltYWdlcy0xMzk5NDc2OTU1LmpwZw==.webp"/></div></figure><p>Maintaining on-time delivery promises will keep shoppers coming back, but fast shipping still has a role to play, retailers said at Home Delivery World 2026.</p> Max Garland Mon, 08 Jun 2026 10:23:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/retailer-delivery-reliability-trumps-speed-macys-ulta/822175/ How brands are celebrating 250 years of America amid political polarization https://www.retaildive.com/news/how-brands-are-celebrating-250-years-of-america-amid-political-polarization/822176/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/k081j836dcPqpzcp5tsN9SCLsGkAJMaXU4IczpeM-L4/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9qZWVwLW1pbGl0YXJ5LmpwZw==.webp"/></div></figure><p>Major marketers looking to engage U.S. consumers around the milestone must prove their bona fides or risk looking like bandwagoners.</p> Chris Kelly Mon, 08 Jun 2026 09:55:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/how-brands-are-celebrating-250-years-of-america-amid-political-polarization/822176/
